description: Calculate the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) for a farm and determine the average health of each crop field. Use the multispectral imagery at /home/ga/GIS_Data/agriculture/farm_imagery.tif (Band 1: Red, Band 2: NIR) and the field boundaries at /home/ga/GIS_Data/agriculture/field_boundaries.geojson. Apply the NDVI formula (NIR - Red) / (NIR + Red) and save the resulting raster to /home/ga/GIS_Data/agriculture/ndvi_output.tif. Calculate the mean NDVI for each field and export the final layer containing these statistics to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/fields_with_yield_potential.geojson.
